name: status-snapshot-contract-validation
title: Validate sd-status work-loop snapshot contracts
description: Fail closed when the dynamically loaded work-loop helper returns a mapping with a missing or unsupported status or without the fields required for an active loop report.
creator: sdelmas
notes: Implemented fail-closed validation for terminal and persisted-run work-loop snapshots, with bounded structural diagnostics, focused regression coverage, the 0.21.6 release ledger, and all seven disposable fleet candidates passing.
